data_quality_notes: This is file-first best-effort. Some values are weekly snapshots if monthly aggregates were not available.
To improve: export month-level product KPIs (Amplitude) into data/ and rerun.

deck.title: Cenoa Performance Marketing — Monthly Executive Update (February 2026)

slides.title: This month at a glance
bullets: **KYC is the single biggest funnel killer.** 94.2% of users who start KYC never submit — and outside Turkey, KYC completion is literally zero (BridgeXYZ doesn't render for NG/EG/PK).
**Turkey carries the business.** 95% of KYC submits, 57% of withdrawals, and the only market with a functioning end-to-end funnel.
**Nigeria and Egypt are blocked goldmines.** Together they represent 46% of installs and show strong feature engagement, but zero new-user activation due to the KYC hard block.
**iOS converts 3.8× worse than Android at KYC** (2.4% vs 9.2% Shown→Submit), and 62% of sign-ups come from web with almost no downstream conversion.
**Channel quality varies wildly.** Apple Search Ads delivers 254 withdrawals from 75 installs; appnext delivers 1 withdrawal from 273 installs. Budget reallocation is the fastest ROI lever after KYC.

slides.title: Most recent KPI pulse (weekly snapshot)
slides.note: Weekly snapshot included because month-aggregate product KPIs may not be available offline.

slides.title: Turkey monthly unit economics — February 2026 vs January 2026
notes: Turkey metrics sourced from blended-cac / CAC analysis sheets (best-effort).
Global realized spend (budget tracking) for February 2026: $57,570

slides.title: Funnel health (latest available) — KYC bottleneck
bullets: KYC is the main bottleneck (shown→submit is low; non-TR markets are hard-blocked).
Attribution gap: majority of withdrawals are unattributed (“(none)”).

guardrails: Do not scale NG/EG until KYC submit clicked > 0 in Amplitude.
Revert test-pool budget if KYC submit stays 0 after 72h post-fix.

meta.spend_proxy_method: Average weekly spend from Sheets CAC Analysis weeks 1-8 Mar and 9-15 Mar (all countries) used as proxy for 14-20 Mar.
notes: Channel CPI/CPA uses spend proxy + different-week outcomes; downstream uses Sheets virt_acc/new_active.
Trafik Canavari export exposed only TR Only tab; no Pmax vs Search CTA breakdown available.

slides.title: Budget pacing (context)
slides.note: Extrapolated from TR weekly cost ($9756/wk) scaled to all geos. 21 days elapsed. ⚠️ Real-time pacing needs fresh Sheets or ad-platform API pull.

slides.title: How to interpret these numbers
bullets: Spend sources are mixed (finance budget tracking vs marketing-attributed spend).
Deposits/withdrawals are cross-cohort in current reporting (include returning users).
Large attribution loss in AppsFlyer/Amplitude join; treat channel ROI as directional.

actions.title: Cap budgets — overspending monthly pace
actions.why: Spend pace at ~159.7% of expected (expected $33,871 vs est. actual $54,082).
actions.expectedImpact: Avoid exceeding monthly budget; force reallocation to highest-quality channels.

actions.title: Diagnose DAU WoW anomaly (↓46.0%)
actions.expectedImpact: Identify root cause and unblock recovery within 24h (tracking, spend, funnel, outages).

actions.title: Diagnose KYC Submit WoW anomaly (↓41.7%)
actions.why: KYC Submit changed ↓41.7% vs last week (307 → 179).
actions.expectedImpact: Identify root cause and unblock recovery within 24h (tracking, spend, funnel, outages).

actions.title: Pause & audit appnext (fraud pattern)
actions.why: 1779 installs, 349 signups but only 47 virt_acc (2.6%) — suspicious downstream
actions.expectedImpact: Reduce low-quality traffic and protect downstream conversion.

actions.title: Pause twitter_ads (DEAD spend)
actions.expectedImpact: Stop wasted spend and reallocate budget to healthy channels.

actions.title: Pause & audit appnext_dsp (fraud pattern)
actions.why: 113 installs but only 2 signups (1.8% conversion) — fraud pattern
actions.expectedImpact: Reduce low-quality traffic and protect downstream conversion.

actions.expectedImpact: Identify root cause and unblock recovery within 24h (tracking, spend, funnel, outages).

instructions: Gamma API export is not wired in this script.
Option A (fast): paste analysis/monthly-deck.md into Gamma → 'Create from text' and refine styling.
Option B (structured): use data/monthly-deck.json as the source-of-truth, then manually map sections/slides into Gamma.
